# Elafibranor 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Elafibranor 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Elafibranor</strong> 目前有 <strong>39 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Elafibranor 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Iqirvo is indicated for the treatment of primary biliary cholangitis (PBC) in combination with ursodeoxycholic acid (UDCA) in adults with an inadequate response to UDCA, or as monotherapy in patients...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>amenorrhea (disease)（99.9%）</li>
<li>non-syndromic esophageal malformation（98.9%）</li>
<li>bone Paget disease（98.9%）</li>
<li>dentinogenesis imperfecta（98.5%）</li>
<li>squamous cell carcinoma（98.5%）</li>
<li>rectal cloacogenic carcinoma（98.5%）</li>
<li>gallbladder adenosquamous carcinoma（98.5%）</li>
<li>deafness, autosomal dominant 39, with dentinogenesis imperfecta 1（98.4%）</li>
<li>adenosquamous breast carcinoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>acantholytic variant squamous cell breast carcinoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>large cell keratinizing variant squamous cell breast carcinoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>spindle cell variant squamous cell breast carcinoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>adenosquamous prostate carcinoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>urethral verrucous carcinoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>carcinoma of lip（98.4%）</li>
<li>metaplastic breast carcinoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>sarcomatoid squamous cell skin carcinoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>dentin dysplasia（98.4%）</li>
<li>ethmoid sinus squamous cell carcinoma（98.4%）</li>
<li>vulvar keratinizing squamous cell carcinoma（98.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/elafibranor/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
